message:
feat(core): lock-free IPC & adaptive batching semantic anomaly watchdog (ft-344j8.7)

SemanticAnomalyWatchdog daemon bridges PTY ingestion and the ONNX-powered
semantic anomaly pipeline without blocking the terminal. Uses crossbeam
ArrayQueue for lock-free SPSC queueing, adaptive batching (configurable
batch_size/timeout), dedicated OS thread, entropy gating, conformal
anomaly detection, and EventBus integration for anomaly publishing.

24 tests covering config, metrics, handle, lifecycle, eventbus, entropy
gate, backpressure shedding, and multi-pane operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
